THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCALLISTER, COY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 385 EDDY STREET #210, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $277.20 RENT, $109.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $386.70, STAYED UNTIL AUG-15-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMED, BUT S/E TO 11PM ON 8/15/95. NO FURTHER STAYS. ANY PROPTY ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. IF DEFT VACATES IN TIMELY MANNER, PLTF WILL SIGN STIPULATION VACAT- ING JUDGMNT & DISMISSAL OF ACTION, BUT PLTF NOT RESP FOR DRAFTING STIP.
